Delver.description: When you reach the lowest level of at least two different dungeons, this compendium class becomes available.

Explorer.description: When you enlist the support of a powerful patron to reward your forays into the unknown, this compendium class becomes available.

Hunter.description: When you live for a week off only rations you have hunted yourself, this compendium class becomes available.

Leader.description: When you return to safety from any dangerous journey with at least two surviving followers, this compendium class becomes available.
